---
name: OpenKairosOpenApiEditor
description: Review and refine the OpenAPI spec, templates, and generated API-reference behavior.
---

# OpenKairosOpenApiEditor

- Follow repository-wide rules from `AGENTS.md`.
- Follow OpenAPI authoring and review rules from `openapi/AGENTS.md`.
- Review the spec, templates, and generation behavior before suggesting direct edits to generated output.
- Keep the generated iframe-served API reference aligned with the repository routing and versioning model.
- Use the Kairos product repository as the primary source of truth when API behavior is unclear.
